headline: Chart of the Day: Floor & Decor Lays the Foundation for Higher Prices
summary: Floor & Decor stock is showing improving technical momentum as the housing market begins to stabilize and home improvement names regain leadership.

headline: The 3 Best Dividend Aristocrats for 2026: The Halftime Scorecard
summary: Six months ago we named three Dividend Aristocrats as the best bets for 2026, and the halftime scorecard reveals one stock that more than doubled the market, one that held steady, and one that hit a wall hard enough to make investors question the pick.

raw.headline: The 3 Best Dividend Aristocrats for 2026: The Halftime Scorecard

headline: How Starbucks’ New Tri-State Store Tests Its ‘Third Place’ Strategy And Loyalty Engine (SBUX)
summary: Starbucks recently began construction on a new, modern-format store at Russell Centre, adding its globally recognized coffee brand to anchors Kroger and Lowe’s and aiming to draw more daily traffic to the Tri-State retail hub. This expansion aligns with management’s broader push to reset the in-store experience and deepen loyalty engagement, underpinned by Starbucks’ extensive global footprint of over 41,000 locations and large Rewards member base. Next, we’ll explore how Starbucks’ renewed...
